title: Plug Power Beats Q1 Estimates, Stock Struggles To Hold Gains
text: Plug Power (NASDAQ: PLUG) exceeded analyst expectations in its first-quarter 2026 earnings report. The company reported a loss of $0.08 per share, beating the consensus estimate of $0.09 per share. Revenue reached $163.51 million, surpassing the Street estimate of $141.17 million and representing year-over-year growth from $133.67 million. CEO Jose Luis Crespo stated: Our first quarter results reflect strong commercial execution and continued progress improving the underlying economics of the business. The company highlighted several operational improvements: hydrogen fuel sales climbed 22% compared to the prior-year quarter, hydrogen fuel margin rate improved by 54 percentage points year-over-year, and GenDrive service costs dropped over 30% annually, contributing to margin gains. The company remains on track to achieve EBITDAS positivity by Q4 2026. Despite the strong earnings, Plug Power struggled to maintain gains. The stock gained approximately 13% during regular trading but moderated slightly in extended hours, closing around $3.55 per share.
